title: Email Notifications

posts.author: JDAY (Jared Yousif)
posts.cookedHtml:
Good Morning Monday Community,

I am working on a Project Request and Proposal Workflow. I have created two forms: Proposal Form and Request Form. When the Request Form gets submitted a notification is sent via email with the attached Proposal Form containing fields from the request form and its own unique fields as well.

The problem I am having is in that the email notification does not contain the link. I added the link through the email automation but it does not show when the email is recieved. Any ideas why?

posts.author: JDAY (Jared Yousif)
posts.cookedHtml:
Update: When I add Unique ID and the Link to the email automation, it just says “incoming form answers” on the email itself. The items are no properly being inserted.

Any Ideas?

posts.author: peta (Peta Bolger)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @JDAY

To the best of my knowledge, it should work if you put the link specifically in a link column type, and then map the automated email to include the link column instead.

Let me know if that doesn’t work!
